title: Tralee, Kerry — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Tralee, Kerry: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Tralee is a city in Kerry with a population of 24,000. The gateway to the Ring of Kerry, a lively market town with a beautiful town park, the Kerry County Museum, and stunning coastal and mountain scenery.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
